title: Foreign arbitral awards can't be challenged on merits at enforcement stage: Supreme Court
description: The Supreme Court on Wednesday reiterated that foreign arbitral awards can be resisted in India only on limited public policy grounds and that courts cannot re-examine such awards on merits at the enforcement stage [Nagaraj V. Mylandla v. PI Opportunities Fund-I and others].A Bench of Justices Sanjay Kumar and Vinod Chandran emphasised,"One must remember that it is the sovereign commitment of India to honour foreign awards, except on the exhaustive grounds provided under Article V of the New Yor
